# Feature Request

### Overview
<!-- Please provide a concise summary of the feature or component you'd like to see added or improved. Explain how it enhances the library in terms of structure, compliance, or semantics. -->

---

### Description
- **What:** <!-- Describe the new feature/component or the change you'd like to propose -->
- **Why:** <!-- Explain the benefits, such as improved accessibility, better semantic markup, code maintainability, or alignment with standards -->
- **Use Case:** <!-- Provide an example scenario or user story that illustrates the need for this feature -->

---

## Acceptance Criteria
<!-- Please specify the requirements that need to be met for this feature to be considered complete -->
<!-- Examples include: -->
<!-- The component adheres to accessibility standards (ARIA, WCAG) -->
<!-- The structure is semantic and meaningful (e.g., using appropriate HTML elements) -->
<!-- Validation for compliance with relevant guidelines -->
<!-- Usage examples or snippets demonstrating proper implementation -->

<!-- References to relevant standards, guidelines, or existing components -->
